languages.text: Дальнобойное оружие сложено в пыльный контейнер — им давно никто не пользовался.

languages.text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.
languages.original_text: Дальнобойное оружие сложено в пыльный контейнер — им давно никто не пользовался.

languages.text: Die Fernkampfwaffe war in einem staubigen Behälter gestapelt worden — niemand hatte sie lange Zeit benutzt.
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.

languages.text: L'arme à distance a été empilée dans un conteneur poussiéreux — personne ne l'a utilisée depuis longtemps.
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.

languages.text: 远程武器被堆放在一个布满灰尘的容器里--很久没有人使用它了。
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.

languages.text: El arma a distancia había sido apilada en un contenedor polvoriento: nadie la utilizaba desde hacía mucho tiempo.
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.

languages.text: その射撃武器は、長い間、誰も使うことなく、ほこりをかぶったコンテナに積まれていた。
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.

languages.text: Menzilli silah tozlu bir konteynere yığılmıştı — uzun zamandır kimse kullanmamıştı.
languages.original_text: The ranged weapon had been piled into a dusty container — nobody used it for a long time.
